title: Abandoned Dawn : SMP Group
description: A cozy horror experience for the Abandoned Dawn SMP roleplay server. Compiled by a small group of friends, for a small group of friends.
body:
Small server for a small group.

Abandoned Dawn : SMP Group is a modpack made for the Abandoned Dawn SMP Group. A small team of friends who are looking forward to a mild horror experience. Using the term "Cozy Horror" when explaining this modpack. There are mods ranging from magic, farming, cuter dogs, to psychological horror, the dark arts, and disturbing new areas to explore. If you are a fan of both the cozy farmlife and the ever fearing horror world, then you've found the perfect modpack for you!
